texto: The nearer a soul is to God, the more it deserves our esteem; the closer the ties that bit it to us, the more sensible is our love for it, and the more whole-hearted should be the devotion we show in all that concerns family, country, vocation, and friendship. Thus, instead of destroying patriotism, charity exalts it, as we see in the case of St. Joan of Arc or St. Louis.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Reginald Garrigou-Lagrange sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “The nearer a soul is to God, the more it deserves our esteem; the closer the ties that bit it to …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amizade, charity, family, útil em momentos de termino e family.
